You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

He begins smiling with hands clasped, then opens and closes his mouth while maintaining the pose. He unclasps his hands to gesture with palms facing inward and fingers spread. Subsequently, he points with his right index finger and makes a pinching motion with his thumb and forefinger. He concludes by gesturing with both open hands, palms inward. The table items and hat remain stationary throughout. From [12-24], a bald man in a dark blue shirt sits behind a table covered with a white cloth, actively gesturing with both hands raised near his chest. Initially, his palms face inward with fingers curling and spreading, while he smiles and moves his mouth animatedly. Around [20-22], he modifies his gesture to form circles with his thumbs and index fingers before lowering his left hand and raising his right into a fist by [22-24]. Throughout the sequence, the table setup

[140-142] A hand tilts a small glass bowl over a split baked potato on a white cutting board, dropping a chunk of yellow butter into the exposed interior. A silver fork rests nearby on the board, while small glass bowls containing shredded yellow cheese and red bits sit stationary on the white tablecloth to the left. [142-148] A right hand holds a silver knife vertically, inserting the blade into the center of the potato to press down and manipulate the fluffy white interior. The knife moves slightly within the flesh as the surrounding bowls and fork remain undisturbed.

From 148-150s, a hand reaches for a background bowl to sprinkle contents onto a split potato resting on a white cutting board, followed by a hand holding a black spice container with a green label. Between 150-152s, the right hand tilts this container to sprinkle spices onto the potato's fluffy interior while glass bowls of shredded yellow cheese and red bacon bits sit undisturbed on the left. At 152-154s, a silver spoon loaded with a white creamy substance lowers into the potato's center to deposit the topping. Finally, from 154-156s, a hand sprinkles white chopped ingredients into the potato, which now holds butter, cream, and the new topping, while the ingredient bowls remain stationary on the white tablecloth.

[156-158] A hand sprinkles small white chopped ingredients into the center of a baked potato resting on a white cutting board, adding to the existing butter and creamy topping. To the left, glass bowls contain shredded yellow cheese and red bacon bits. [158-162] The right hand moves from the potato to the cheese bowl, grasps a pinch of shredded yellow cheese, lifts it, and deposits the shreds on top of the butter and white toppings inside the split potato. [162-164] After placing the cheese, the hand moves to the small glass bowl with red bacon bits at the bottom left and grasps a portion of the bits.

[164-168] A hand reaches into a small glass bowl containing red bacon bits on the left side of the table, lifting a portion to sprinkle over a baked potato resting on a white cutting board. The potato already features a layer of shredded yellow cheese and white toppings inside the split. [168-172] The hand then grabs a pinch of chopped green garnish, resembling chives or green onions, and sprinkles it atop the bacon and cheese layers. Several small glass bowls with various toppings are arranged on a white tablecloth next to the cutting board.

recent_thinks: [24-26] The camera cuts to a close-up of the table, excluding the man. Visible items include a green oil bottle, a large empty glass bowl, a fork, a whole baked potato, and small glass bowls containing white powder, chopped onions, red bits, shredded cheese, and green herbs. A wooden chair and window blinds are in the background.

[36-38] A hand reaches in from the right to grasp the brown potato on the white cutting board. The potato is lifted off the surface and held in the air. The small glass bowls with ingredients and the green bottle remain undisturbed on the table.

[138-140] A hand tilts a small glass bowl containing a yellow substance over the split baked potato resting on the white cutting board. The yellow substance begins to slide out of the bowl towards the exposed fluffy white interior of the potato. Other ingredient bowls remain stationary on the left.

[172-174] A hand sprinkles chopped green onions onto the baked potato, adding to the existing layer of shredded yellow cheese and red bacon bits. The green garnish falls onto the center of the split potato skin. The hand completes the distribution of the green pieces over the toppings on the white cutting board.

queries.question: Is the white cylindrical container with black text seen in the earlier frames still present on the table in the segment where the person is piercing the potato with a fork?
Is the person wearing a dark long-sleeved shirt pressing down on the object inside the bowl?

samples.output: <think>A hand sprinkles chopped green onions onto the baked potato resting on a white cutting board. The potato is layered with shredded yellow cheese, red bacon bits, and white creamy toppings. Several small glass bowls containing ingredients remain arranged on the white tablecloth to the left.</think><action>silent</action>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-12] A bald man in a dark blue polo shirt sits at a table covered with a white cloth, backed by beige window blinds. Arranged before him are a green oil bottle, glass bowls with water, powders, yellow liquid, and corn, a bread roll, and a white paper chef's hat reading "Cooking with Matt". He begins smiling with hands clasped, then opens and closes his mouth while maintaining the pose. He unclasps his hands to gesture with palms facing inward and fingers spread. Subsequently, he points with his right index finger and makes a pinching motion with his thumb and forefinger. He concludes by gesturing with both open hands, palms inward. The table items and hat remain stationary throughout. From [12-24], a bald man in a dark blue shirt sits behind a table covered with a white cloth, actively gesturing with both hands raised near his chest. Initially, his palms face inward with fingers curling and spreading, while he smiles and moves his mouth animatedly. Around [20-22], he modifies his gesture to form circles with his thumbs and index fingers before lowering his left hand and raising his right into a fist by [22-24]. Throughout the sequence, the table setup

[120-126] A right hand holds a black-handled knife vertically over a brown potato on a white cutting board, while a left hand presses a silver fork against the potato to stabilize it. The knife blade descends, slicing into the potato skin. To the left, small glass bowls containing shredded yellow cheese, red bacon bits, and clear liquids sit on the white tablecloth. [126-130] The knife is removed and the fork is placed on the board. Both hands then reach forward to squeeze the potato, pressing fingers into the skin to check texture. The cutlery remains on the board, and the ingredient bowls stay undisturbed throughout the process.

[130-134] Two hands pull apart a brown baked potato on a white cutting board, splitting the skin to expose the fluffy white interior. The hands gesture near the potato, pointing at the inside, while a silver fork and knife lie stationary nearby. Small glass bowls containing shredded yellow cheese, red bits, and white ingredients remain arranged on the left. [134-138] The split potato rests open on the board. A right hand reaches for a small glass bowl containing a yellow substance at the top right, grasps it, and lifts it into the air above the cutting board. The hand holds the bowl ready while the other ingredient bowls stay undisturbed on the table.

[140-142] A hand tilts a small glass bowl over a split baked potato on a white cutting board, dropping a chunk of yellow butter into the exposed interior. A silver fork rests nearby on the board, while small glass bowls containing shredded yellow cheese and red bits sit stationary on the white tablecloth to the left. [142-148] A right hand holds a silver knife vertically, inserting the blade into the center of the potato to press down and manipulate the fluffy white interior. The knife moves slightly within the flesh as the surrounding bowls and fork remain undisturbed.

From 148-150s, a hand reaches for a background bowl to sprinkle contents onto a split potato resting on a white cutting board, followed by a hand holding a black spice container with a green label. Between 150-152s, the right hand tilts this container to sprinkle spices onto the potato's fluffy interior while glass bowls of shredded yellow cheese and red bacon bits sit undisturbed on the left. At 152-154s, a silver spoon loaded with a white creamy substance lowers into the potato's center to deposit the topping. Finally, from 154-156s, a hand sprinkles white chopped ingredients into the potato, which now holds butter, cream, and the new topping, while the ingredient bowls remain stationary on the white tablecloth.

recent_thinks: [24-26] The camera cuts to a close-up of the table, excluding the man. Visible items include a green oil bottle, a large empty glass bowl, a fork, a whole baked potato, and small glass bowls containing white powder, chopped onions, red bits, shredded cheese, and green herbs. A wooden chair and window blinds are in the background.

[36-38] A hand reaches in from the right to grasp the brown potato on the white cutting board. The potato is lifted off the surface and held in the air. The small glass bowls with ingredients and the green bottle remain undisturbed on the table.

[138-140] A hand tilts a small glass bowl containing a yellow substance over the split baked potato resting on the white cutting board. The yellow substance begins to slide out of the bowl towards the exposed fluffy white interior of the potato. Other ingredient bowls remain stationary on the left.

[156-158] A hand sprinkles small white chopped ingredients into the center of the baked potato, adding to the existing butter and creamy topping. The potato sits on a white cutting board, flanked by glass bowls containing shredded yellow cheese and red bacon bits on the left side of the table.

[158-160] A right hand moves from the potato to a small glass bowl containing shredded yellow cheese on the left. The fingers grasp a pinch of the yellow shreds, lifting them slightly. The baked potato on the white cutting board remains stationary, filled with butter, white cream, and chopped white toppings.

samples.output: <think>A hand grasps shredded yellow cheese from a small glass bowl on the left side of the table. The hand then moves over the baked potato on the white cutting board and deposits the yellow shreds on top of the butter and white toppings already inside the split potato.</think><action>silent</action>
